g.text: Normal Account Insert By Sport - SP Insert Detailed
Parse JSON and prepare temp tables
Columns: CustID, CTSCustID, SportID, DWCategoryID, TurnoverRM, WinlossRM, BetCount, ActiveDays, PerformanceTime, SpecialCC, etc.
Extract: CustID, SportID, DWCategoryID, TurnoverRM, WinlossRM, BetCount, ActiveDays, PerformanceTime
Join with CTSCustomer to get CTSCustID
Join: CustID = CustID AND SportID = SportID
Join with SpecialCustomerClass_BySport to get SpecialCC
Check: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CTSCustomerClassification_BySport WHERE ParentID = CONST_PARENTID_PA)
Mark IsExistPA if customer has PA classification
- OR (NewCategory is Probation/Smart/Risky AND ProbationDate > LastProbationDay)
If DWCategoryID = Probation AND ProbationDate < LastProbationDay
If last history TargetCC = -1 OR CategoryID = SpecialCC
Check if need to remove SpecialCC
- CONST_SOURCETYPE_LESSTHAN10TICKETS (1): OldCategoryGroupID = NEW AND NewCategoryGroupID = NEW
If ActionType = UPDATE/RESCAN_CHANGECC AND NewCategoryID = OldCategoryID
Fields: CustID, SportID, CategoryID, ParentID, TargetCC, TurnoverRM, WinlossRM, BetCount, ActiveDays, PerformanceTime, LastModifiedDate
Insert history record for all changes
